creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 214698
patch to update the port

- update 0.35 -> 0.37
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/Test-Most
- request maintainership as Jun Kuriyama is absent for 5+ years, see:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/devel/p5-Test-Most/Makefile?view=log

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- Tested with:
12.1-RELEASE-p5 amd64
poudriere 3.3.4
perl 5.30.2
pkg 1.14.4
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
